skills.name: Clear Immediate Match
skills.summary: game=candy_crush | skill=clear_immediate_match | effects=clear_completed | context=use when an immediate 3-match is available to raise score, reduce remaining candies, and improve cascade potential
skills.description: Swap two adjacent candies to complete an immediate 3-in-a-row and clear it. Use this whenever a direct match is available, especially early in the board, to score points and open space for new candies

skills.name: Make Immediate Match
skills.summary: game=candy_crush | skill=Make Immediate Match | effects=execute_completed | context=use when a swap creates an immediate 3-candy row or column match for quick points while preserving future board flexibility
skills.description: Swap two adjacent candies to complete a 3-in-a-row match immediately. Use it when an obvious match is available, especially early in the level, to score points, clear space, and set up cascades.

skills.name: Swap Row 3 Center
skills.summary: game=candy_crush | skill=Swap Row 3 Center | effects=position_completed | context=use when tagging the strongest immediate 3-match by swapping the center candies in row 3
skills.description: Swap the two center candies in row 3 to create an immediate 3-match or trigger a nearby cascade. Use it in midgame when that row’s middle controls multiple possible matches or can activate special can
